violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment to use disposable ware or dishmachine in kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the glasswasher. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025
The condensate from the keg room is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain in a proper manner. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2025
